ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reservoir_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone (e.g., UpperReek, MidReek, LowerReek) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the zone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the zone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone where the region belongs */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES reservoir_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservoir_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone where the data was collected */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region within the zone */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  "bulk_oil" REAL /* Bulk oil volume */,
  "pore_oil" REAL /* Pore oil volume */,
  "hcpv_oil" REAL /* HCPV oil volume */,
  "stoiip_oil" REAL /* STOIIP oil volume */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata associated with the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservoir_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservoir_data_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES reservoir_zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservoir_data_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., geologist, reservoir engineer, data analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservoir data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES reservoir_data ("data_id")
)
